text: Ever wondered how trees drink water? Meet xylem, the plant's water highway. It moves water from roots to leaves. But how does it defy gravity? Through cohesion and adhesion, water molecules stick together and to the xylem walls. This creates a continuous pull, drawing water upward. It's nature's magic! Want more cool plant science? Hit subscribe and discover more!
